title: Harmonic Intervals — Frequency Ratios and Visual Geometry
description: Standard musical intervals expressed as frequency ratios, with tolerance ranges for near-matches in gematria pairs, and the corresponding visual geometry they produce in Lissajous/interference patterns.

intervals.name: Unison
intervals.visual: Circular rings — no angular variation. Perfect resonance.

intervals.name: Octave
intervals.visual: Figure-8 or two-lobed pattern. Doubling symmetry.
intervals.gematria_example: AHAVAH(13) : HOD(15) ≈ not quite; YESOD(80) : AHAVAH(13) × 6 = 78 ≈ near

intervals.name: Perfect Fifth
intervals.visual: Three-lobed figure — trefoil. Classic Lissajous at 3:2.

intervals.name: Perfect Fourth
intervals.visual: Cross/box pattern. Four petals with right angles.

intervals.name: Minor Third
intervals.visual: Six-petaled figure. Hexagonal. Flower of Life adjacent.

intervals.name: Tritone
intervals.visual: Irrational ratio → quasiperiodic, never closes. Spiraling.
